      "text": "Tà ſakka tas KUNGS:

felehin / un ne neſteet nekahdu
"

      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Deenas-Widdus/ un atneſſihs

Nammā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nastu Swehdeenā/ un ne wed-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne iſweddeet arridsan

fu Tehweem eſmu patwehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee ne irr klaufijschi/
neds ſawas Ausis atgreeſufcbt/
bet irr ſawu Pakauju apzeeti-
najschi/ un ne klaufijscht/ un to
Pamahzifchann ne peexehmuschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nu tas notiks / ja

feet ne kahdu Nastu zaar ſcha
Pilssahta Wahrtim Swehdee-
nā/ un fivehtiſeet to Swehdee-
nu/ ne darridami ne kahdu Dar-
bu eeſsch tahs/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad ees zaar ſcha Pilṣ-

Matteem un Sirgeem/ tee pa-
schi/ un winnu Leeli-Kungi/ tee
Wihrì no Juhda/ un tee Eedſih-
wotaji no Jerusalemes/ un ſchis
Pilṣfahts tapß eedſihwohts muh-
schtgi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee nahks no teem

kaht Jerusalemi/ un no Ben-
jamina Semmes/ un no Ee-

      "text": "Bet ja juhs mannis n

ni / kaß Jerusalemes skaistu-

apdſehsts.
"

    {
      "n": 1,

      "text": "Deews runna no ſawa Spehka/ un itt ka ta

"

      "text": "Tad nogabju es Pohdne-
